title: Stark
Content authoring
description: Settings related to formatting and authoring content.

title: Text formats
description: Configure how content input by users is filtered, including allowed HTML tags. Also allows enabling of module-provided filters.

title: jQuery update
description: Configure settings related to the jQuery upgrade, the library path and compression.

title: Logging and errors
description: Settings for logging and alerts modules. Various modules can route Drupal's system events to different destinations, such as syslog, database, email, etc.

title: Maintenance mode
description: Take the site offline for maintenance or bring it back online.

title: Performance
description: Enable or disable page caching for anonymous users and set CSS and JS bandwidth optimization options.

title: Strongarm
description: Manage Drupal variable settings that have been strongarmed.

title: File system
description: Tell Drupal where to store uploaded files and how they are accessed.

title: Image styles
description: Configure styles that can be used for resizing or adjusting images on display.

title: Add image effect
description: Add a new effect to a style.

title: Edit image effect
description: Edit an existing effect within a style.

title: Delete image effect
description: Delete an existing effect from a style.

title: List
description: List the current image styles on the site.

title: Image toolkit
description: Choose which image toolkit to use if you have installed optional toolkits.

title: Account settings
description: Configure default behavior of users, including registration requirements, e-mails, fields, and user pictures.

title: Date and time
description: Configure display formats for date and time.

title: Formats
description: Configure display format strings for date and time.

title: Delete date format
description: Allow users to delete a configured date format.

title: Edit date format
description: Allow users to edit a configured date format.

title: Add format
description: Allow users to add additional date formats.

title: Types
description: Configure display formats for date and time.

title: Delete date type
description: Allow users to delete a configured date type.

title: Regional settings
description: Settings for the site's default time zone and country.

title: Search and metadata
description: Local site search, metadata and SEO.

title: Clean URLs
description: Enable or disable clean URLs for your site.

title: URL aliases
description: Change your site's URL paths by aliasing them.

title: Edit search page
description: Configure or delete a search page.

title: XML sitemap
description: Configure your site's XML sitemaps to help search engines find and index pages on your site.

title: RSS publishing
description: Configure the site description, the number of items per feed and whether feeds should be titles/teasers/full-text.

title: Actions
description: Manage the actions defined for your site.

title: Manage actions
description: Manage the actions defined for your site.

title: Google Analytics
description: Configure tracking behavior to get insights into your website traffic and marketing effectiveness.

title: IP Geolocation Views & Maps
description: Configure map markers and how geolocation information is updated.

title: Site information
description: Change site name, e-mail address, slogan, default front page, and number of posts per page, error pages.

title: User interface
description: Tools that enhance the user interface.

title: Module filter
description: Configure how the modules page looks and acts.

title: Migrate
description: Manage importing of data into your Drupal site

title: Help
description: Reference for usage, configuration, and modules.

title: People
description: Manage user accounts, roles, and permissions.

title: List
description: Find and manage people interacting with your site.

title: Permissions
description: Determine access to features by selecting permissions for roles.

title: Permissions
description: Determine access to features by selecting permissions for roles.

title: Roles
description: List, edit, or add user roles.

title: Recent log messages
description: View events that have recently been logged.

title: Status report
description: Get a status report about your site's operation and any detected problems.

title: Structure
description: Administer blocks, content types, menus, etc.

title: Blocks
description: Configure what block content appears in your site's sidebars and other regions.
